basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India – Office Assistant, Attender and More
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Office Assistant,Attender and More Posts. Candidates with 7th, BSW/BA/B.Com, Any Graduate, 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Central Bank of India official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
